rootCause: The app passed a long PlayerState questsFinished array to dChat and implicitly relied on the LLM to count completed quests and infer remaining quests, even though authoritative state already existed in code.
resolution: Added deterministic quest stats derived in-app from validated gameState.quests intersected with the official built-in quest catalog, injected explicit completed/total/remaining values into the PlayerState prompt block and debug metadata, and added regression tests including /gamesaves envelope restore coverage.
